items.name: Dispatcher fall-through — if/else if chain
validation: Dispatcher uses if/else if chain — no fall-through possible ✓
Each subcommand branch ends with process.exit(0) safety net ✓
Nested subcommands (credentials, access) have their own if/else if + usage error ✓
TypeScript compiles with zero errors ✓

items.name: Frame allowlist-output — relay only known fields
validation: sanitizeFrame() constructs new objects with only known fields per frame type ✓
All 9 ALLOWED_FRAME_TYPES handled in sanitizeFrame switch ✓
Both bufferable (token, tool_use_start) and non-bufferable frames sanitized ✓
No extra-property passthrough from compromised worker ✓

items.name: Remove as any casts in credential grant iteration
validation: Zero as any casts in credentials.ts ✓

CredentialGrant type derived from AgentFrontmatter via NonNullable chains ✓
TypeScript compiles with zero errors ✓

items.name: Fix stale _AssertZodMatchesTs reference in security.md
validation: No _AssertZodMatchesTs reference in docs/security.md ✓
Describes z.infer<typeof WsClientMessageSchema> derivation mechanism ✓

items.name: Type safeSend as WsServerMessage
validation: safeSend typed as (ws, data: WsServerMessage) — protocol drift caught at compile time ✓
WsWarning type added to WsServerMessage union ✓
WsPong type added to WsServerMessage union ✓
retryAfter?: number added to WsError ✓
TypeScript compiles with zero errors ✓

items.name: Replace as any casts in streamToStdout

text_token and assistant event kinds handled ✓

items.name: Update docs/security-model.md
validation: security-model.md updated with Layers 9 (WS Protocol Safety) and 10 (Observability) ✓
Layer 8 expanded with process isolation details (fork-per-session, IPC, frame sanitization) ✓
Links to security.md for comprehensive audit narrative ✓
z.infer<> derivation described (not _AssertZodMatchesTs) ✓

items.name: Wrap ws.close() in try/catch at all call sites
validation: safeClose() helper wraps ws.close() in try/catch ✓
Auth failure path uses safeClose ✓
Rate limit path uses safeClose ✓
Idle timeout paths use safeClose ✓
Token revocation path uses safeClose (removed redundant try/catch) ✓
Shutdown path uses safeClose ✓
Only bare ws.close() is inside safeClose helper itself ✓

items.name: Unknown subcommand handling
validation: Unknown positional args (e.g. mastersof-ai foo) print usage error ✓
mastersof-ai access (missing subcommand) prints 'Usage: access <create|rotate>' ✓
mastersof-ai credentials (missing subcommand) prints 'Usage: credentials <migrate|check>' ✓
Usage error lists all available commands and flags ✓

items.name: --agents explicit or warn on wildcard default

reviewFixes.description: tool_result frames from worker lacked id field; sanitizeFrame produced undefined as number
reviewFixes.fix: Added id: frameId++ to onToolResult in session-worker.ts

reviewFixes.description: sanitizeFrame casts without runtime type validation — compromised worker could inject wrong types
reviewFixes.fix: Added typeof checks and enum validation for every field; frames with wrong types return null

reviewFixes.description: CredentialGrant type duplicated via NonNullable chain in two files
reviewFixes.fix: Exported CredentialGrant from manifest.ts; both CLI modules import it

reviewFixes.fix: Added validateName call at top of cliAccessRotate

reviewFixes.description: cliCreate called without await — fragile if changed to async
